itinerary.title: Airport pickup
itinerary.detail: Driver meets at IST international arrivals, name board 'Lindqvist'.

itinerary.title: Hotel check-in
itinerary.detail: CVK Park Bosphorus Hotel. Reservation under Sofia Lindqvist. Two guests.

itinerary.title: Rhinoplasty procedure
itinerary.detail: Morning of Jun 20 at Estetik International Clinic.

care_instructions.title: Food and drink before surgery
care_instructions.body: Do not eat or drink anything, including water, at least 6-8 hours before your surgery. Have a light meal the night before and nothing after midnight.

care_instructions.title: Smoking and nicotine
care_instructions.body: Stop all nicotine products at least 2 weeks before surgery. Nicotine negatively affects healing and increases anesthesia risks.

care_instructions.title: Blood-thinning medications
care_instructions.body: Avoid blood-thinning medications such as Aspirin, Ibuprofen, Naproxen, Voltaren at least 5-7 days before surgery, and consult your doctor first. Do not take any medication without informing us.

care_instructions.title: Post-op recovery instructions
care_instructions.body: Personalized post-operative instructions are provided after surgery and are not yet finalized. Post-op questions must be confirmed with the clinic.

messages.text: Hi! We just landed at IST a little early. Is the driver here yet? We're at international arrivals.
Welcome to Istanbul! Your driver is Kerem Aydin (+90 532 999 0071), meeting you at international arrivals with a name board 'Lindqvist'. Since you're early I'm checking on his ETA now.
It's been 25 minutes and we can't find anyone with our name. No one is answering that number. We're getting nervous.
I'm sorry - I'm flagging this to the Essos concierge team right now so a human can reach the driver and confirm your pickup. Please stay at international arrivals; someone will be with you shortly.

escalation.summary: Patient stranded at IST arrivals; driver not located and not answering phone after 25 minutes.
